revision.text:
{{Infobox 事件・事故 |名称= 露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件 |正式名称= |画像= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |脚注= 容疑者の逮捕を進めている静岡県警 |場所= [[茨城県]]、[[神奈川県]]、[[岐阜県]]、[[静岡県]]、[[兵庫県]]、[[北海道]] |緯度度= |緯度分= |緯度秒= |経度度= |経度分= |経度秒= |標的= |日付= 2019年 - 2021年 |時間= |開始時刻= |終了時刻= |時間帯= |概要= 盗撮マニアグループが全国の露天風呂で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件。 |懸賞金= |原因= |手段= |攻撃側人数= |凶器= |武器= |兵器= |死亡= |負傷= |行方不明= |被害者= |損害= |犯人= |容疑= |動機= |関与= |防御= |対処= |謝罪= |補償= |賠償= |刑事訴訟= |少年審判= |海難審判= |民事訴訟= |影響= |遺族会= |被害者の会= |管轄= }} '''露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件'''（ろてんぶろでのそしきてきとうさつじけん）とは、2019年から2021年にかけて[[盗撮]]マニアグループが全国の[[露天風呂]]で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件である。盗撮した映像はグループのメンバー間で共有され、鑑賞のための「上映会」も行われていたという。 2021年12月にリーダー格の男Aを含む男ら3人が逮捕されたことを皮切りに、2023年2月時点で合計16人の男が[[静岡県警察]]により逮捕されている（[[#逮捕|後述]]）。全容はまだ掴めていないものの、盗撮の被害を受けた施設等は80ヵ所以上、押収品は1,200点以上となっており、グループのメンバーは100人以上とみられている{{Cite web |url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}。 == 概要 == === 被害場所 === 盗撮等の被害が確認された場所は以下の通りである。 * [[茨城県]]の露天風呂、住宅 * [[神奈川県]]の露天風呂 * [[岐阜県]]の露天風呂 * [[静岡県]]の露天風呂 * [[兵庫県]]の露天風呂 * [[北海道]]の露天風呂 === 手口 === 盗撮には様々な種類のカメラが用いられていた。脱衣所で[[超小型写真|小型カメラ]]を用いて撮影したり{{Cite web |url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54044 |title=「女子バスケットボール部の"鬼畜動画"をオフ会で鑑賞した」犯行グループの一員が告白する《組織的盗撮犯罪の下劣な実態》とは |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}、100m以上離れた山中から[[望遠レンズ|望遠カメラ]]を用いて撮影したりしていた。 依頼して盗撮してもらう「依頼盗撮」もあった。客の男は盗撮してほしい女性を温泉に呼び込み、待ち構えている男Aが盗撮した。 睡眠薬（[[デートレイプドラッグ]]）で女性を眠らせて性犯罪に及ぶこともあり、「眠り姫」と呼ばれていた{{Cite web |url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20230201-OYT1T50285/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」率いるグループ16人摘発…男「30年前から1万人は盗撮」 |accessdate=2023-02-18 |date=2023-02-02 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}。 === 特徴と対策 === 静岡県警は、盗撮犯が狙う施設の特徴として5つの特徴を挙げた{{Cite web |url=https://www.fnn.jp/articles/-/398970 |title=気付かぬうちに被害者に…山から撮影 露天風呂盗撮事件の捜査続く 望遠レンズの性能と対策【静岡発】 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-08-24 |website=FNNプライムオンライン}}。 # 若い女性が多く訪れる[[日帰り入浴施設]] # 男湯・女湯が入れ替わる # 見通しを妨げるものがない # 山に撮影可能な場所がある # 山の出入り口に[[監視カメラ|防犯カメラ]]がない その上で、盗撮への対策として「防犯カメラの設置」「外部から見えにくい施設への改良」「不審な人・車の警戒」の3つを示した。また、露天風呂の外壁に[[発光ダイオード|LED]]照明を設置して山側を照らすことで、山側から見ると[[逆光]]になるようにした旅館もある。 == 逮捕 == 男Aを含む最初の3人が逮捕されたきっかけは、2021年10月の静岡県[[藤枝市]]での[[職務質問]]であった{{Cite web |url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54043 |title="盗撮のカリスマ"容疑者が逮捕 犯行グループの一員が明かす"卑劣な手口"「若い女性が集まる連休にはグループで"温泉盗撮旅"へ」 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}。職務質問によりノコギリの所持が判明したため、男Aらは[[銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|銃刀法]]違反で逮捕された。すると「盗撮に邪魔な木を切るため」と供述したことから、全国規模の組織的盗撮の可能性が浮上した。 その後、実際に盗撮マニアグループの存在が判明し、メンバーが次々に逮捕されることとなった。容疑は[[迷惑防止条例]]違反（盗撮）の他、[[児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|児童ポルノ禁止法]]違反や[[住居侵入罪|建造物侵入罪]]等である。 === リーダー格の男A === 男Aは盗撮画像を投稿するアダルト[[電子掲示板|掲示板]]で知り合った男たちと共謀し、複数の都道府県の露天風呂において女性客を盗撮していた。インターネット上では'''盗撮のカリスマ'''と呼ばれていた。盗撮グループのメンバーだった別の男によると、男Aは露天風呂盗撮界の有名人であり、「盗撮好きなら一度は彼の動画を見たことがある」のではないかと述べている。 盗撮歴は約30年で、沖縄県を除く46都道府県で盗撮を繰り返し、1万人以上を盗撮したと供述している。盗撮動画は盗撮販売サイトで販売し、相当なお金を稼いでいたという。2013年には少女が写った動画を販売したことにより、児童ポルノ禁止法違反で茨城県警に逮捕された。 1人で行動することも多かったが、特に連休には若い女性も多くなり「撮れ高」が良いため、チームを組んで温泉盗撮旅に出ることもあった。遠出するときには周到な準備を行っていた。移動履歴が分からないように高速道路を避け、撮影の邪魔にならないように盗撮前夜に草や枝を除去し、宿泊履歴が残らないように車中泊を行うなどしていたという。 === 逮捕者の一覧 === 2023年2月時点での逮捕者は以下の16人である。年齢は逮捕当時のものである。複数回逮捕された者については、最初の逮捕日を記載している。 {| class="wikitable" ! 逮捕者 !! 職業 !! 居住地 !! 逮捕日 !! 備考・参照記事 |- |49歳の男A |無職 |[[茨城県]][[行方市]] |2021年12月 |リーダー格{{Cite web |url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20211203-OYT1T50070/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」ら3人、望遠レンズで露天風呂のぞく…100m超離れて撮影・動画を売買 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2021-12-04 |website=読売新聞オンライン}} |- |32歳の男 |無職 |[[岡山県]][[岡山市]] |2021年12月 |懲役3年、執行猶予4年{{Cite web |url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/-/194015 |title=「あなたの感覚は歪んでいる」と裁判官が“説諭”　露天風呂を盗撮　マニアグループの男に有罪判決ー静岡地裁 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-11-02 |website=TBS NEWS DIG}} |- |40歳の男 |地方公務員
（鹿児島県庁） |[[鹿児島県]][[鹿屋市]] |2021年12月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web |url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220618-OYT1T50260/ |title=露天風呂の入浴女性を3道県でビデオ盗撮、組織的犯行の元県職員に執行猶予付き判決 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-06-20 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}
懲戒免職処分 |- |39歳の男 |会社員 |[[北海道]][[苫小牧市]] |2022年1月 |{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1017451.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮で3容疑者逮捕 藤枝署 逮捕者計4人に |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-01-26 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |40代の男 |国家公務員 |[[三重県]] |2022年2月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web |url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17517595 |title=組織的盗撮マニアグループか 露天風呂の女性盗撮した容疑で国家公務員の男を逮捕…100メートル離れ望遠レンズ付きビデオカメラで狙ったか 静岡県警 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-02-09 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}}{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1139461.html |title=露天風呂盗撮の国家公務員有罪 静岡地裁判決 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-10-21 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |43歳の男 |飲食店店員 |[[千葉県]][[市川市]] |2022年7月 |懲役1年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web |url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220707-OYT1T50376/ |title=組織的な露天風呂盗撮、知人女性2人の撮影依頼の男も…6人目の逮捕者 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-09 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}{{Cite web |url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17592772 |title=盗撮マニアに依頼　知人の女性を盗撮させた会社員の被告に有罪判決 |accessdate=2022-12-14 |date=2022-12-14 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}} |- |34歳の男 |無職 |[[大阪府]][[八尾市]] |2022年7月 |{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1099580.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮事件 7人目の容疑者逮捕 藤枝署など |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-27 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |29歳の男 |水産作業員 |[[茨城県]][[潮来市]] |2022年8月 |{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1105688.html |title=盗撮と児童ポルノ製造容疑の男逮捕 グループ8人目、藤枝署 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-08-09 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |60歳の男 |会社役員 |[[東京都]][[世田谷区]] |2022年9月 |不起訴処分{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1125847.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮事件 9人目の容疑者逮捕 藤枝署など |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-09-20 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}}{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1139037.html |title=露天風呂盗撮事件 会社役員を不起訴 静岡地検 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-10-20 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |47歳の男 |会社員 |[[埼玉県]][[八潮市]] |2022年10月 |{{Cite web |url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1135512.html |title=知人にわいせつ疑い 埼玉の男逮捕 藤枝署、盗撮事件10人目 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-10-12 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |52歳の男 |派遣社員 |東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]] |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}} |- |20歳の男 |無職 |[[栃木県]] |2023年2月 | |- |54歳の男 |無職 |北海道 |2023年2月 | |} == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[盗撮]] * [[露天風呂]] * {{Infobox 事件・事故 |名称= 露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件 |正式名称= |画像= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |脚注= 容疑者の逮捕を進めている静岡県警 |場所= [[茨城県]]、[[神奈川県]]、[[岐阜県]]、[[静岡県]]、[[兵庫県]]、[[北海道]] |緯度度= |緯度分= |緯度秒= |経度度= |経度分= |経度秒= |標的= |日付= 2019年 - 2021年 |時間= |開始時刻= |終了時刻= |時間帯= |概要= 盗撮マニアグループが全国の露天風呂で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件。 |懸賞金= |原因= |手段= |攻撃側人数= |凶器= |武器= |兵器= |死亡= |負傷= |行方不明= |被害者= |損害= |犯人= |容疑= |動機= |関与= |防御= |対処= |謝罪= |補償= |賠償= |刑事訴訟= |少年審判= |海難審判= |民事訴訟= |影響= |遺族会= |被害者の会= |管轄= }} '''露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件'''（ろてんぶろでのそしきてきとうさつじけん）とは、2019年から2021年にかけて[[盗撮]]マニアグループが全国の[[露天風呂]]で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件である。盗撮した映像はグループのメンバー間で共有され、鑑賞のための「上映会」も行われていたという。 2021年12月にリーダー格の男Aを含む男ら3人が逮捕されたことを皮切りに、2023年2月時点で合計16人の男が[[静岡県警察]]により逮捕されている（[[#逮捕|後述]]）。全容はまだ掴めていないものの、盗撮の被害を受けた施設等は80ヵ所以上、押収品は1,200点以上となっており、グループのメンバーは100人以上とみられている{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}。 == 概要 == === 被害場所 === 盗撮等の被害が確認された場所は以下の通りである。 * [[茨城県]]の露天風呂、住宅 * [[神奈川県]]の露天風呂 * [[岐阜県]]の露天風呂 * [[静岡県]]の露天風呂 * [[兵庫県]]の露天風呂 * [[北海道]]の露天風呂 === 手口 === 盗撮には様々な種類のカメラが用いられていた。脱衣所で[[超小型写真|小型カメラ]]を用いて撮影したり{{Cite web|和書|url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54044 |title=「女子バスケットボール部の"鬼畜動画"をオフ会で鑑賞した」犯行グループの一員が告白する《組織的盗撮犯罪の下劣な実態》とは |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}、100m以上離れた山中から[[望遠レンズ|望遠カメラ]]を用いて撮影したりしていた。 依頼して盗撮してもらう「依頼盗撮」もあった。客の男は盗撮してほしい女性を温泉に呼び込み、待ち構えている男Aが盗撮した。 睡眠薬（[[デートレイプドラッグ]]）で女性を眠らせて性犯罪に及ぶこともあり、「眠り姫」と呼ばれていた{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20230201-OYT1T50285/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」率いるグループ16人摘発…男「30年前から1万人は盗撮」 |accessdate=2023-02-18 |date=2023-02-02 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}。 === 特徴と対策 === 静岡県警は、盗撮犯が狙う施設の特徴として5つの特徴を挙げた{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.fnn.jp/articles/-/398970 |title=気付かぬうちに被害者に…山から撮影 露天風呂盗撮事件の捜査続く 望遠レンズの性能と対策【静岡発】 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-08-24 |website=FNNプライムオンライン}}。 # 若い女性が多く訪れる[[日帰り入浴施設]] # 男湯・女湯が入れ替わる # 見通しを妨げるものがない # 山に撮影可能な場所がある # 山の出入り口に[[監視カメラ|防犯カメラ]]がない その上で、盗撮への対策として「防犯カメラの設置」「外部から見えにくい施設への改良」「不審な人・車の警戒」の3つを示した。また、露天風呂の外壁に[[発光ダイオード|LED]]照明を設置して山側を照らすことで、山側から見ると[[逆光]]になるようにした旅館もある。 == 逮捕 == 男Aを含む最初の3人が逮捕されたきっかけは、2021年10月の静岡県[[藤枝市]]での[[職務質問]]であった{{Cite web|和書|url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54043 |title="盗撮のカリスマ"容疑者が逮捕 犯行グループの一員が明かす"卑劣な手口"「若い女性が集まる連休にはグループで"温泉盗撮旅"へ」 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}。職務質問によりノコギリの所持が判明したため、男Aらは[[銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|銃刀法]]違反で逮捕された。すると「盗撮に邪魔な木を切るため」と供述したことから、全国規模の組織的盗撮の可能性が浮上した。 その後、実際に盗撮マニアグループの存在が判明し、メンバーが次々に逮捕されることとなった。容疑は[[迷惑防止条例]]違反（盗撮）の他、[[児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|児童ポルノ禁止法]]違反や[[住居侵入罪|建造物侵入罪]]等である。 === リーダー格の男A === 男Aは盗撮画像を投稿するアダルト[[電子掲示板|掲示板]]で知り合った男たちと共謀し、複数の都道府県の露天風呂において女性客を盗撮していた。インターネット上では'''盗撮のカリスマ'''と呼ばれていた。盗撮グループのメンバーだった別の男によると、男Aは露天風呂盗撮界の有名人であり、「盗撮好きなら一度は彼の動画を見たことがある」のではないかと述べている。 盗撮歴は約30年で、沖縄県を除く46都道府県で盗撮を繰り返し、1万人以上を盗撮したと供述している。盗撮動画は盗撮販売サイトで販売し、相当なお金を稼いでいたという。2013年には少女が写った動画を販売したことにより、児童ポルノ禁止法違反で茨城県警に逮捕された。 1人で行動することも多かったが、特に連休には若い女性も多くなり「撮れ高」が良いため、チームを組んで温泉盗撮旅に出ることもあった。遠出するときには周到な準備を行っていた。移動履歴が分からないように高速道路を避け、撮影の邪魔にならないように盗撮前夜に草や枝を除去し、宿泊履歴が残らないように車中泊を行うなどしていたという。 === 逮捕者の一覧 === 2023年2月時点での逮捕者は以下の16人である。年齢は逮捕当時のものである。複数回逮捕された者については、最初の逮捕日を記載している。 {| class="wikitable" ! 逮捕者 !! 職業 !! 居住地 !! 逮捕日 !! 備考・参照記事 |- |49歳の男A |無職 |[[茨城県]][[行方市]] |2021年12月 |リーダー格{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20211203-OYT1T50070/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」ら3人、望遠レンズで露天風呂のぞく…100m超離れて撮影・動画を売買 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2021-12-04 |website=読売新聞オンライン}} |- |32歳の男 |無職 |[[岡山県]][[岡山市]] |2021年12月 |懲役3年、執行猶予4年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/-/194015 |title=「あなたの感覚は歪んでいる」と裁判官が“説諭”　露天風呂を盗撮　マニアグループの男に有罪判決ー静岡地裁 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-11-02 |website=TBS NEWS DIG}} |- |40歳の男 |地方公務員
（鹿児島県庁） |[[鹿児島県]][[鹿屋市]] |2021年12月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220618-OYT1T50260/ |title=露天風呂の入浴女性を3道県でビデオ盗撮、組織的犯行の元県職員に執行猶予付き判決 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-06-20 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}
懲戒免職処分 |- |39歳の男 |会社員 |[[北海道]][[苫小牧市]] |2022年1月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1017451.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮で3容疑者逮捕 藤枝署 逮捕者計4人に |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-01-26 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |40代の男 |国家公務員 |[[三重県]] |2022年2月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17517595 |title=組織的盗撮マニアグループか 露天風呂の女性盗撮した容疑で国家公務員の男を逮捕…100メートル離れ望遠レンズ付きビデオカメラで狙ったか 静岡県警 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-02-09 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}}{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1139461.html |title=露天風呂盗撮の国家公務員有罪 静岡地裁判決 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-10-21 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |43歳の男 |飲食店店員 |[[千葉県]][[市川市]] |2022年7月 |懲役1年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220707-OYT1T50376/ |title=組織的な露天風呂盗撮、知人女性2人の撮影依頼の男も…6人目の逮捕者 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-09 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}{{Cite web|和書|url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17592772 |title=盗撮マニアに依頼　知人の女性を盗撮させた会社員の被告に有罪判決 |accessdate=2022-12-14 |date=2022-12-14 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}} |- |34歳の男 |無職 |[[大阪府]][[八尾市]] |2022年7月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1099580.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮事件 7人目の容疑者逮捕 藤枝署など |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-27 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |29歳の男 |水産作業員 |[[茨城県]][[潮来市]] |2022年8月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1105688.html |title=盗撮と児童ポルノ製造容疑の男逮捕 グループ8人目、藤枝署 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-08-09 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |60歳の男 |会社役員 |[[東京都]][[世田谷区]] |2022年9月 |不起訴処分{{Cite {{Infobox 事件・事故 |名称= 露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件 |正式名称= |画像= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |脚注= 容疑者の逮捕を進めている静岡県警 |場所= [[茨城県]]、[[神奈川県]]、[[岐阜県]]、[[静岡県]]、[[兵庫県]]、[[北海道]] |緯度度= |緯度分= |緯度秒= |経度度= |経度分= |経度秒= |標的= |日付= 2019年 - 2021年 |時間= |開始時刻= |終了時刻= |時間帯= |概要= 盗撮マニアグループが全国の露天風呂で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件。 |懸賞金= |原因= |手段= |攻撃側人数= |凶器= |武器= |兵器= |死亡= |負傷= |行方不明= |被害者= |損害= |犯人= |容疑= |動機= |関与= |防御= |対処= |謝罪= |補償= |賠償= |刑事訴訟= |少年審判= |海難審判= |民事訴訟= |影響= |遺族会= |被害者の会= |管轄= }} '''露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件'''（ろてんぶろでのそしきてきとうさつじけん）とは、2019年から2021年にかけて[[盗撮]]マニアグループが全国の[[露天風呂]]で女性客の盗撮を繰り返していた事件である。盗撮した映像はグループのメンバー間で共有され、鑑賞のための「上映会」も行われていたという。 2021年12月にリーダー格の男Aを含む男ら3人が逮捕されたことを皮切りに、2023年2月時点で合計16人の男が[[静岡県警察]]により逮捕されている（[[#逮捕|後述]]）。全容はまだ掴めていないものの、盗撮の被害を受けた施設等は80ヵ所以上、押収品は1,200点以上となっており、グループのメンバーは100人以上とみられている{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}。 == 概要 == === 被害場所 === 盗撮等の被害が確認された場所は以下の通りである。 * [[茨城県]]の露天風呂、住宅 * [[神奈川県]]の露天風呂 * [[岐阜県]]の露天風呂 * [[静岡県]]の露天風呂 * [[兵庫県]]の露天風呂 * [[北海道]]の露天風呂 === 手口 === 盗撮には様々な種類のカメラが用いられていた。脱衣所で[[超小型写真|小型カメラ]]を用いて撮影したり{{Cite web|和書|url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54044 |title=「女子バスケットボール部の"鬼畜動画"をオフ会で鑑賞した」犯行グループの一員が告白する《組織的盗撮犯罪の下劣な実態》とは |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}、100m以上離れた山中から[[望遠レンズ|望遠カメラ]]を用いて撮影したりしていた。 依頼して盗撮してもらう「依頼盗撮」もあった。客の男は盗撮してほしい女性を温泉に呼び込み、待ち構えている男Aが盗撮した。 睡眠薬（[[デートレイプドラッグ]]）で女性を眠らせて性犯罪に及ぶこともあり、「眠り姫」と呼ばれていた{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20230201-OYT1T50285/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」率いるグループ16人摘発…男「30年前から1万人は盗撮」 |accessdate=2023-02-18 |date=2023-02-02 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}。 === 特徴と対策 === 静岡県警は、盗撮犯が狙う施設の特徴として5つの特徴を挙げた{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.fnn.jp/articles/-/398970 |title=気付かぬうちに被害者に…山から撮影 露天風呂盗撮事件の捜査続く 望遠レンズの性能と対策【静岡発】 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-08-24 |website=FNNプライムオンライン}}。 # 若い女性が多く訪れる[[日帰り入浴施設]] # 男湯・女湯が入れ替わる # 見通しを妨げるものがない # 山に撮影可能な場所がある # 山の出入り口に[[監視カメラ|防犯カメラ]]がない その上で、盗撮への対策として「防犯カメラの設置」「外部から見えにくい施設への改良」「不審な人・車の警戒」の3つを示した。また、露天風呂の外壁に[[発光ダイオード|LED]]照明を設置して山側を照らすことで、山側から見ると[[逆光]]になるようにした旅館もある。 == 逮捕 == 男Aを含む最初の3人が逮捕されたきっかけは、2021年10月の静岡県[[藤枝市]]での[[職務質問]]であった{{Cite web|和書|url=https://bunshun.jp/articles/-/54043 |title="盗撮のカリスマ"容疑者が逮捕 犯行グループの一員が明かす"卑劣な手口"「若い女性が集まる連休にはグループで"温泉盗撮旅"へ」 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-05-01 |website=文春オンライン}}。職務質問によりノコギリの所持が判明したため、男Aらは[[銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|銃刀法]]違反で逮捕された。すると「盗撮に邪魔な木を切るため」と供述したことから、全国規模の組織的盗撮の可能性が浮上した。 その後、実際に盗撮マニアグループの存在が判明し、メンバーが次々に逮捕されることとなった。容疑は[[迷惑防止条例]]違反（盗撮）の他、[[児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|児童ポルノ禁止法]]違反や[[住居侵入罪|建造物侵入罪]]等である。 === リーダー格の男A === 男Aは盗撮画像を投稿するアダルト[[電子掲示板|掲示板]]で知り合った男たちと共謀し、複数の都道府県の露天風呂において女性客を盗撮していた。インターネット上では'''盗撮のカリスマ'''と呼ばれていた。盗撮グループのメンバーだった別の男によると、男Aは露天風呂盗撮界の有名人であり、「盗撮好きなら一度は彼の動画を見たことがある」のではないかと述べている。 盗撮歴は約30年で、[[沖縄県]]を除く46都道府県で盗撮を繰り返し、1万人以上を盗撮したと供述している。盗撮動画は盗撮販売サイトで販売し、相当なお金を稼いでいたという。2013年には少女が写った動画を販売したことにより、児童ポルノ禁止法違反で茨城県警に逮捕された。 1人で行動することも多かったが、特に連休には若い女性も多くなり「撮れ高」が良いため、チームを組んで温泉盗撮旅に出ることもあった。遠出するときには周到な準備を行っていた。移動履歴が分からないように高速道路を避け、撮影の邪魔にならないように盗撮前夜に草や枝を除去し、宿泊履歴が残らないように車中泊を行うなどしていたという。 === 逮捕者の一覧 === 2023年2月時点での逮捕者は以下の16人である。年齢は逮捕当時のものである。複数回逮捕された者については、最初の逮捕日を記載している。 {| class="wikitable" ! 逮捕者 !! 職業 !! 居住地 !! 逮捕日 !! 備考・参照記事 |- |49歳の男A |無職 |[[茨城県]][[行方市]] |2021年12月 |リーダー格{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20211203-OYT1T50070/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」ら3人、望遠レンズで露天風呂のぞく…100m超離れて撮影・動画を売買 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2021-12-04 |website=読売新聞オンライン}} |- |32歳の男 |無職 |[[岡山県]][[岡山市]] |2021年12月 |懲役3年、執行猶予4年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/-/194015 |title=「あなたの感覚は歪んでいる」と裁判官が“説諭”　露天風呂を盗撮　マニアグループの男に有罪判決ー静岡地裁 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-11-02 |website=TBS NEWS DIG}} |- |40歳の男 |地方公務員
（鹿児島県庁） |[[鹿児島県]][[鹿屋市]] |2021年12月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220618-OYT1T50260/ |title=露天風呂の入浴女性を3道県でビデオ盗撮、組織的犯行の元県職員に執行猶予付き判決 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-06-20 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}
懲戒免職処分 |- |39歳の男 |会社員 |[[北海道]][[苫小牧市]] |2022年1月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1017451.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮で3容疑者逮捕 藤枝署 逮捕者計4人に |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-01-26 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |40代の男 |国家公務員 |[[三重県]] |2022年2月 |懲役2年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17517595 |title=組織的盗撮マニアグループか 露天風呂の女性盗撮した容疑で国家公務員の男を逮捕…100メートル離れ望遠レンズ付きビデオカメラで狙ったか 静岡県警 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-02-09 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}}{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1139461.html |title=露天風呂盗撮の国家公務員有罪 静岡地裁判決 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-10-21 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |43歳の男 |飲食店店員 |[[千葉県]][[市川市]] |2022年7月 |懲役1年、執行猶予3年{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220707-OYT1T50376/ |title=組織的な露天風呂盗撮、知人女性2人の撮影依頼の男も…6人目の逮捕者 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-09 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}{{Cite web|和書|url=https://look.satv.co.jp/_ct/17592772 |title=盗撮マニアに依頼　知人の女性を盗撮させた会社員の被告に有罪判決 |accessdate=2022-12-14 |date=2022-12-14 |website=LOOK 静岡朝日テレビ}} |- |34歳の男 |無職 |[[大阪府]][[八尾市]] |2022年7月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1099580.html |title=露天風呂組織的盗撮事件 7人目の容疑者逮捕 藤枝署など |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-07-27 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |29歳の男 |水産作業員 |[[茨城県]][[潮来市]] |2022年8月 |{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.at-s.com/news/article/shizuoka/1105688.html |title=盗撮と児童ポルノ製造容疑の男逮捕 グループ8人目、藤枝署 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-08-09 |website=あなたの静岡新聞}} |- |60歳の男 |会社役員 |[[東京都]][[世田谷区]] |2022年9月 |不起訴処分{{Cite revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal redirect page for [[Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Rotenburo baths]] (contains 3 links).
revision.text: <!-- Contains 3 links --> #redirect[[:en:Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Rotenburo baths]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|zh|露天浴}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|zh|日帰浴设施}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !! {{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|zh|露天浴}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|zh|日帰浴设施}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !! {{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|zh|露天浴}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! {{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! {{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! {{Infobox Incident |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|12=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|12=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|12=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|12=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|12=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|12=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|12=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|12=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|12=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|12=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|12=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|12=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|12=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|12=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|12=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|12=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|12=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Activity]] [[Category:Violence Against Women in Japan]] [[Category:2019 Incidents in Japan]] [[Category:2020 Incidents in Japan]] [[Category:2021 Incidents in Japan]] }} [[ja:露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件]] [[de:Organisierte Voyeurismus-Vorfall in Freiluftbädern]]

{{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |Image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|12=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|12=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership. Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|12=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|12=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|12=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|12=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|12=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|12=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|12=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|12=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|12=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|12=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|12=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|12=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|12=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|12=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|12=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !!
