revision.text:
{{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|12=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|12=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|12=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|12=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|12=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|12=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|12=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|12=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|12=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|12=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|12=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|12=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|12=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|12=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|12=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|12=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|12=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! {{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|12=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|12=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|12=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|12=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|12=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|12=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|12=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|12=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|12=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|12=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|12=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|12=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|12=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|12=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|12=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|12=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|12=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! revision.text:
{{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|12=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|12=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|12=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|12=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|12=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|12=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|12=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|12=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|12=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|12=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|12=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|12=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|12=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|12=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|12=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|12=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|12=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|12=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|12=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|12=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|12=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! [[sn:Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Rotenburo baths]] [[ja:露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件]] [[de:Organisierte Voyeurismus-Vorfall in Freiluftbädern]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|qq=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|qq=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|qq=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|qq=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|qq=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyogo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|qq=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|qq=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|qq=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|qq=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|qq=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|qq=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|qq=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|qq=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|qq=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|qq=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|qq=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|qq=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|qq=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !! revision.comment: Text replacement - "Hyogo Prefecture" to "Hyōgo Prefecture"
revision.text:
{{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Hyogo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|qq=draft}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|qq=draft}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|qq=draft}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|qq=draft}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|qq=draft}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|qq=draft}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|qq=draft}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|qq=draft}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|qq=draft}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|qq=draft}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|qq=draft}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|qq=draft}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|qq=draft}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|qq=draft}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|qq=draft}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|qq=draft}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|qq=draft}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|qq=draft}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|qq=draft}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Voyeurism|qq=}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath|13=User:Immanuelle/Rotenburo|qq=}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuoka Prefectural Police|qq=}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arrest|qq=}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Residence|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyogo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|qq=}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miniature Camera|qq=}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Telephoto Lens|qq=}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date-Rape Drug|qq=}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-Use Bath Facility|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-trip bathing facility|qq=}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Surveillance Camera|qq=}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Light-Emitting Diode|qq=}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujieda City|qq=}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Firearms and Swords Control Act|qq=}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|qq=}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Trespassing|qq=}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bulletin Board|qq=}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okinawa Prefecture|qq=}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! {{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuoka Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Hyōgo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokkaido|qq=}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Voyeurism|qq=}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath|13=User:Immanuelle/Rotenburo|qq=}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuoka Prefectural Police|qq=}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arrest|qq=}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Residence|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyōgo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|qq=}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miniature Camera|qq=}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Telephoto Lens|qq=}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date-Rape Drug|qq=}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-Use Bath Facility|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-trip bathing facility|qq=}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Surveillance Camera|qq=}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Light-Emitting Diode|qq=}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujieda City|qq=}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Firearms and Swords Control Act|qq=}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|qq=}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Trespassing|qq=}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bulletin Board|qq=}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okinawa Prefecture|qq=}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !! {{Infobox event |Name= Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths |Official name= |image= Shizuoka Prefectural Government Office 20090401.jpg |Caption= Shizuoka Prefectural Police advancing the arrest of the suspect |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県|zh|神奈川县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Gifu Prefecture|de|Gifu|ja|岐阜県|zh|岐阜县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Shizuoka|ja|静岡県|zh|静冈县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuoka Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Hyōgo|ja|兵庫県|zh|兵库县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Hokkaido|de|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|zh|北海道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokkaido|qq=}} |Latitude (degrees)= |Latitude (minutes)= |Latitude (seconds)= |Longitude (degrees)= |Longitude (minutes)= |Longitude (seconds)= |Target= |Date= 2019 – 2021 |Time= |Start time= |End time= |Time zone= |Summary= Incident in which a voyeurism enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers without their consent at open-air baths nationwide. |Reward= |Cause= |Method= |Number of attackers= |Murder weapon= |Weapon= |Armaments= |Deaths= |Injuries= |Missing persons= |Victims= |Damage= |Offender= |Charges= |Motive= |Involvement= |Defense= |Response= |Apology= |Compensation= |Damages= |Criminal proceedings= |Juvenile trial= |Maritime trial= |Civil proceedings= |Impact= |Survivors' association= |Victims' group= |Jurisdiction= }} '''Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths''' (露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件) refers to the case in which, from 2019 to 2021, a {{ill|Voyeurism|de|Voyeurismus|ja|盗撮|zh|偷拍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Voyeurism|qq=}} enthusiast group repeatedly filmed female customers at {{ill|Open-Air Bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|1=Rotenburo|zh|露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath|13=User:Immanuelle/Rotenburo|qq=}} facilities nationwide. The secretly filmed videos were shared among the group’s members, and screening events were even held for viewership.[https://jref.com/threads/onsen-voyeurism-17-arrested-over-decades-of-hot-spring-peeping.509953/ Crime - Onsen voyeurism: 17 arrested over decades of hot spring peeping | Japan Reference] Starting with the arrest of three men—including the ringleader referred to as Man A—in December 2021, a total of 16 men have been arrested by the {{ill|Shizuoka Prefectural Police|de|Polizei von Shizuoka|ja|静岡県警察|zh|静冈县警察|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuoka Prefectural Police|qq=}} as of February 2023 (see {{ill|Arrest|de|Arrest|ja|逮捕|zh|逮捕|lt=Later|lt_ja=後述|lt_de=Später|lt_zh=后述|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arrest|qq=}}). Although the full scope of the operation remains unclear, over 80 facilities have been affected by the secret filming, more than 1,200 items have been confiscated, and the group is believed to number over 100 members{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/sbs/306002 |title=「沖縄のぞく46都道府県で1万人以上撮った」“盗撮のカリスマ”が供述　マニアグループは総勢100人以上に…SNSやオフ会などで増えたか |accessdate=2023-02-01 |date=2023-02-01 |website=静岡新聞SBS}}. == Summary == === Affected Locations === * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Ibaraki|ja|茨城県の露天風呂|zh|茨城县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Residence|de|Wohnhaus|ja|住宅|zh|住宅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Residence|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県の露天風呂|zh|神奈川县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Gifu|ja|岐阜県の露天風呂|zh|岐阜县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Gifu Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Shizuoka|ja|静岡県の露天風呂|zh|静冈县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Shizuoka Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|de|Freiluftbad in Hyōgo|ja|兵庫県の露天風呂|zh|兵库县的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}} * {{ill|Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|de|Freiluftbad in Hokkaido|ja|北海道の露天風呂|zh|北海道的露天浴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Open-Air Bath in Hokkaido|qq=}} === Method of Operation === Various types of cameras were employed for the secret filming. In some cases, filming was carried out in the changing room using a {{ill|Miniature Camera|de|Miniaturkamera|ja|超小型写真|zh|微型相机|lt=Small Camera|lt_ja=小型カメラ|lt_de=Kleine Kamera|lt_zh=小型相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miniature Camera|qq=}}; in others, filming was conducted from over 100 meters away in the mountains with a {{ill|Telephoto Lens|de|Teleobjektiv|ja|望遠レンズ|zh|望远镜头|lt=Telephoto Camera|lt_ja=望遠カメラ|lt_de=Telekamera|lt_zh=望远相机|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Telephoto Lens|qq=}}. There were also instances of "commissioned voyeurism," in which a male customer would bring a desired female to the hot spring and have the waiting Man A record the encounter. In some cases, women were drugged with a {{ill|Date-Rape Drug|de|Vergewaltigungsdroge|ja|デートレイプドラッグ|zh|约会强奸药|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date-Rape Drug|qq=}} to induce sleep before sexual assault, earning the moniker “Sleeping Princess”. === Characteristics and Countermeasures === The Shizuoka Prefectural Police identified five characteristics commonly found in facilities targeted by the secret filming: # Facilities such as {{ill|Day-Use Bath Facility|de|Tagesbad|ja|日帰り入浴施設|1=Day-trip bathing facility|zh|日帰浴设施|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-Use Bath Facility|13=User:Immanuelle/Day-trip bathing facility|qq=}} that are frequently visited by young women # An alternation between men’s and women’s baths # An unobstructed line of sight # Locations in the surrounding mountains that allow for filming # The absence of a {{ill|Surveillance Camera|de|Überwachungskamera|ja|監視カメラ|zh|监控摄像头|lt=Security Camera|lt_ja=防犯カメラ|lt_de=Sicherheitskamera|lt_zh=安防摄像头|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Surveillance Camera|qq=}} at the mountain entrances In response to these vulnerabilities, countermeasures were proposed including the installation of surveillance cameras, modifications to render facilities less visible from the outside, and increased vigilance toward suspicious persons or vehicles. In addition, some inns have installed {{ill|Light-Emitting Diode|de|Leuchtdiode|ja|発光ダイオード|zh|发光二极管|lt=LED|lt_ja=LED|lt_de=LED|lt_zh=LED|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Light-Emitting Diode|qq=}} lighting on the exterior walls of the open-air baths so that the mountain side is illuminated, producing a backlighting effect when viewed from the mountain. == Arrests == The initial arrest of three individuals—including the ringleader Man A—was triggered by a police questioning in October 2021 in {{ill|Fujieda City|de|Fujieda|ja|藤枝市|zh|藤枝市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujieda City|qq=}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. During the stop-and-question, possession of a saw was discovered; as a result, Man A and his accomplices were arrested for violating the {{ill|Firearms and Swords Control Act|de|Waffengesetz|ja|銃砲刀剣類所持等取締法|zh|枪炮刀剑类持有管制法|lt=Gun and Sword Law|lt_ja=銃刀法|lt_de=Waffenrecht|lt_zh=枪械法律|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Firearms and Swords Control Act|qq=}}. Their subsequent explanation—that trees obstructing their filming were cut down—raised suspicions of a nationwide organized secret filming operation. Thereafter, the existence of the voyeurism enthusiast group was confirmed, leading to the successive arrest of its members. Charges include violations of the {{ill|Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung|ja|迷惑防止条例|zh|防骚扰条例|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|qq=}}, as well as offenses under the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} and {{ill|Trespassing|de|Hausfriedensbruch|ja|住居侵入罪|zh|非法入侵罪|lt=Building Trespass|lt_ja=建造物侵入罪|lt_de=Gebäudeeinbruch|lt_zh=建筑物入侵罪|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Trespassing|qq=}}, among other charges. === Ringleader Man A === Man A conspired with other men he met on an adult {{ill|Bulletin Board|de|Schwarzes Brett|ja|電子掲示板|zh|电子公告板|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bulletin Board|qq=}} dedicated to sharing voyeurism images, filming female customers at various open-air baths across multiple prefectures. On the internet he came to be known as the '''Voyeurism Icon'''. According to another member of the voyeurism group, Man A was a renowned figure in the realm of open-air bath voyeurism, with many enthusiasts having likely viewed his videos at least once. His secret filming career spanned roughly 30 years; excluding {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|de|Okinawa|ja|沖縄県|zh|冲绳县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okinawa Prefecture|qq=}}, he claimed to have filmed over 10,000 instances across 46 prefectures. It is reported that he sold these videos on voyeurism websites, amassing a considerable sum of money. In 2013, he was arrested by the Ibaraki Prefectural Police for violating the {{ill|Child Pornography Prohibition Act|de|Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|ja|児童買春、児童ポルノに係る行為等の規制及び処罰並びに児童の保護等に関する法律|zh|儿童色情禁止法|lt=Child Pornography Law|lt_ja=児童ポルノ禁止法|lt_de=Kinderpornografie-Gesetz|lt_zh=儿童色情法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Child Pornography Prohibition Act|qq=}} after having sold a video featuring a minor. Although Man A often acted alone, during holiday periods—when young women were in greater numbers and the potential for high-quality footage increased—he would form teams for filming excursions. When traveling, he took meticulous precautions such as avoiding highways to obscure travel records, clearing away vegetation the night before filming to prevent obstructions, and even sleeping in his car so as not to leave a hotel record. === List of Arrested Individuals === {| class="wikitable" ! Arrested Person !! Occupation !! Residence !! Arrest Date !! Notes/Reference |- | Man A, 49 years old | Unemployed | {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|de|Ibaraki|ja|茨城県|zh|茨城县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Namegata City|de|Namegata|ja|行方市|zh|行方市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Namegata City|qq=}} | December 2021 | Ringleader{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20211203-OYT1T50070/ |title=「盗撮のカリスマ」ら3人、望遠レンズで露天風呂のぞく…100m超離れて撮影・動画を売買 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2021-12-04 |website=読売新聞オンライン}} |- | Man, 32 years old | Unemployed | {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|de|Okayama|ja|岡山県|zh|冈山县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Okayama City|de|Okayama|ja|岡山市|zh|冈山市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama City|qq=}} | December 2021 | 3 years imprisonment, 4 years suspended sentence{{Cite web|和書|url=https://newsdig.tbs.co.jp/articles/-/194015 |title=「あなたの感覚は歪んでいる」と裁判官が“説諭”　露天風呂を盗撮　マニアグループの男に有罪判決ー静岡地裁 |accessdate=2022-11-02 |date=2022-11-02 |website=TBS NEWS DIG}} |- | Man, 40 years old | Local government employee
(Kagoshima Prefectural Government) | {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|de|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島県|zh|鹿儿岛县|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagoshima Prefecture|qq=}}、{{ill|Kanoya City|de|Kanoya|ja|鹿屋市|zh|鹿屋市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoya City|qq=}} | December 2021 | 2 years imprisonment, 3 years suspended sentence{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/20220618-OYT1T50260/ |title=露天風呂の入浴女性を3道県でビデオ盗撮、組織的犯行の元県職員に執行猶予付き判決 |accessdate=2022-10-21 |date=2022-06-20 |website=読売新聞オンライン}}
